description: OpenAI Responses streaming with provider-executed file_search tool (variant). Validates v3 provider tool lifecycle, including tool-input streaming and tool-call/tool-result ordering.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeOpenAIClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: This scenario includes a file_search_call output item and validates that it is represented as provider tool parts (not function tool calls).
